introSection: Thunderbird is a wooden roller coaster built by Great Coasters International currently located at PowerPark in Alahärmä, Vaasa, West-Finland. It opened in 2006 and is the furthest-north wooden roller coaster in the world. It is also the first European roller coaster built by Great Coasters International.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Thunderbird is a wooden roller coaster manufactured by Great Coasters International. A clone of the ride named American Thunder was built at Six Flags St. Louis in 2008.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Thunderbird has Millennium Flyer trains also built by Great Coasters International.

fullText:
Thunderbird is a wooden roller coaster built by Great Coasters International currently located at PowerPark in Alahärmä, Vaasa, West-Finland. It opened in 2006 and is the furthest-north wooden roller coaster in the world. It is also the first European roller coaster built by Great Coasters International.

Thunderbird is a wooden roller coaster manufactured by Great Coasters International. A clone of the ride named American Thunder was built at Six Flags St. Louis in 2008.

Thunderbird has Millennium Flyer trains also built by Great Coasters International.
